solarPowerEfficiency.title: Solar Panel Efficiency
solarPowerEfficiency.tooltip: Controls how much energy the ship's solar panels can produce

shipBatteryEfficiency.title: Ship Battery Efficiency
shipBatteryEfficiency.tooltip: Controls how much energy the battery can maintain over time

solarPanelsEnabled.title: Solar Panels
solarPanelsEnabled.tooltip: Controls whether the solar panels are enabled or disabled

solarPanelLayout.title: Solar Panel Layout
solarPanelLayout.tooltip: Controls the layout of the solar panels on the ship (R = Right, L = Left, Cockpit = Above Cockpit)
